subject: Bump patch version
commit_message:
Bump patch version

Bump patch version in preparation for Amsterdam
branching.

Issue-ID: CIMAN-120

Change-Id: Ic69c1a6a6538dfe0985198d0875b531acc9341a2
Signed-off-by: Jeremy Phelps <jphelps@linuxfoundation.org>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vfc-nfvo-wfengine-master-engine-mgr-service-verify-java/56/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/vfc-nfvo-wfengine-master-engine-mgr-service-verify-java/56/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vfc-nfvo-wfengine-master-engine-mgr-service-verify-java/56
